page_metadata.biotools__summary: HTCA is an interactive web-based healthy human single-cell transcriptome landscape, containing 19 adult tissues and their matching fetal tissues, demonstrating diverse and in-depth transcriptomics profiles of all cell types across tissues.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HTCA is an interactive web-based healthy human single-cell transcriptome landscape, containing 19 adult tissues and their matching fetal tissues, demonstrating diverse and in-depth transcriptomics profiles of all cell types across tissues.
